indications.text:
Major Depressive Disorder
PEXEVA® (paroxetine mesylate) is indicated for the treatment of MDD.
The efficacy of paroxetine in the treatment of a major depressive episode was established in 6-week controlled
trials of outpatients whose diagnoses corresponded most closely to the DSM-III category of MDD...

PEXEVA is indicated in adults for the treatment of:
• Major depressive disorder (MDD)
• Obsessive-compulsive disorder (OCD)
• Panic disorder (PD)
• Generalized anxiety disorder (GAD)
